result.stdout:
Usage: Harpy.Cli generate commandhandler [options] <Name> <Model>

Arguments:
  Name             Name for the command
  Model            The type of return

Options:
  -r|--repository  name:type | Repository used in the command
  -q|--query       name:type | Query used in the command
  --force          Force override file if exist
  -?|-h|--help     Show help information
